---
title: "Media"
---

News coverage and media mentions of the NSW Child E Cohort Program. *[Placeholder entries — replace with real media items, newest first.]*

::: {.media-item}
<p class="media-date">[Placeholder Month] 2026</p>
**[Placeholder headline: NSW study links early childhood data to improve outcomes]**

*[Placeholder outlet name.]* Short summary of the coverage. [Read more →](#)
:::

::: {.media-item}
<p class="media-date">[Placeholder Month] 2025</p>
**[Placeholder headline: Program lead discusses child cohort research]**

*[Placeholder outlet name.]* Short summary of the coverage. [Read more →](#)
:::

::: {.media-item}
<p class="media-date">[Placeholder Month] 2025</p>
**[Placeholder headline: New funding announced for NSW child health data linkage]**

*[Placeholder outlet name.]* Short summary of the coverage. [Read more →](#)
:::
